scripts.build: npm run build:list && npm run build:attach
scripts.build:list: esbuild src/tmux-list-sessions.jsx --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/tmux-list-sessions.js --external:react --external:ink && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/tmux-list-sessions.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/tmux-list-sessions.js && chmod +x dist/tmux-list-sessions.js
scripts.build:attach: esbuild src/tmux-attach-session.jsx --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/tmux-attach-session.js --external:react --external:ink && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/tmux-attach-session.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/tmux-attach-session.js && chmod +x dist/tmux-attach-session.js
